commit_title: Add mean and sigma lines to distribution plot
commit_message: Render mean and ±1σ guideline lines and annotations in the plot popup when stdDev > 0. Adds shapes and annotations (red dashed mean, blue dotted ±1σ) to the Plotly layout and increases the top margin to accommodate the labels so they don't overlap the chart. This visually highlights the distribution center and spread in the popup histogram.
